economic_notes: Band owns 100% of K'ul Management Group Ltd. which holds controlling investments in aggregates, cruises, forestry, construction, and residential development LPs. Band holds 20% interest in Skaha Hills Limited Partnership. Kettle Valley Railway lands transfer negotiation in progress. COVID-19 noted as subsequent event with additional funding received post year-end.
notes: Prior year (2019) comparative figures were restated due to reclassification of K'ul Management Group Ltd. and K'ul Management Group LP from fully consolidated to modified equity basis (GBE treatment). This reduced 2019 accumulated surplus by $1,147,543. Net income from business enterprise (KMGLTD) was a loss of $2,871,325 in 2020 vs income of $2,094,996 in 2019, significantly impacting annual surplus. Land Lease revenue of $4,800,000 appeared in 2019 but not 2020, contributing to the large year-over-year revenue decline. Wages and benefits per segmented schedule total $6,669,774 vs $6,352,254 per expenditures by object — difference likely due to segment schedule including items allocated differently. No schedule of remuneration provided.
